name: ResumePhotoStamp
description: Repro: Word Add Picture process whose XAML is correct (WordAddImage nested in UseWordFile, valid absolute ImagePath, InsertRelativeTo=Document) but faults because Microsoft Word (WINWORD.EXE) crashes/closes while the image is inserted. The COM cast to Word._Document then fails on the async-completion path with HRESULT 0x8001010E (RPC_E_WRONG_THREAD) — a downstream symptom of the process crash, not a source defect. Exercises the Word process-crash branch (E4) of the word-com-interop-failures playbook.
